python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick PASS.

Apply the two-path shader classifier per piece (reuse tools.model_viewer_kenney._apply_gltf_color_and_shading; either import or move to shared module).

determinism_guard and python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick both PASS.

pm_bug_tickets.pm_diagnosis_hints: Agent 03 made 124 line changes to ursina_app.py in a8a9864.
